goal: Add a transfer-manifest readiness guard to the verified external CUDA training launcher before it runs the real-adapter training handoff, without claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO.
head: c79f7d0
docs_root_resolution: User requested current repo docs; /home/firewine/getbeta/docs protocol copy is reference-only for this checkout.
blocked_scope: Changing product/runtime API behavior, frontend behavior, DB schema, release readiness acceptance criteria, packet verifier criteria, or no-fake endpoint checks
Refreshing the external CUDA operator packet in this phase before the launcher guard commit exists as a source commit
Generating, inventing, copying, or promoting real adapter, endpoint, benchmark, package, export, release, or external evidence into the repository
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Committing model weights, strict model cache files, adapter artifacts, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, generated venv content, transfer manifests, or Docker layers
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: Modify only the verified launcher generator, its focused tests, regenerated launcher artifacts, and LLM handoff docs. Packet refresh is deferred until after this source commit exists.
required_evidence: PABCD contract is valid JSON and includes mode=development plus phase notes for plan, audit, build, check, and done.
Verified launcher command order is packet verification, transfer-manifest readiness, then real-adapter CUDA training handoff.
Launcher shell refuses fake backend and still does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.
Focused tests cover the new transfer-manifest command and ordering.
Generated launcher JSON/markdown/shell are refreshed from the generator and pass JSON/shell validation.
No packet, transfer manifest, adapter, endpoint, evidence bundle, M6 review GO, product runtime, frontend, DB, or schema changes are staged.
A follow-up packet refresh is required after the launcher guard commit.
warnings: This phase improves external operator safety only.
Changing the launcher artifact will make the existing operator packet stale until the follow-up source-pinned packet refresh.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO until accepted real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.

phase_notes.plan: Add a transfer-manifest readiness command to the verified launcher before the CUDA training handoff.
phase_notes.audit: Current launcher verifies the packet then runs training; transfer manifest readiness is generated elsewhere but not enforced by the launcher.
phase_notes.build: Patch launcher generator, focused test expectations, regenerate launcher JSON/markdown/shell, and update LLM handoff docs.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, regenerate artifacts, validate shell/JSON, evidence strings, status, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: Verification passed; launcher artifacts now require transfer-manifest readiness before training and are ready for commit/push. Follow-up packet refresh is required. Release remains NOT_GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: Add transfer-manifest readiness guard to the verified external CUDA launcher and regenerate launcher artifacts.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/frontend/DB/schema/M6 review/packet changes in this phase; no release GO claim; no generated model cache, adapter, Docker, endpoint, evidence bundle, transfer manifest, or venv artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: After verification passes, stage, commit, push over SSH, and refresh origin/main tracking.
pabcd.plan: Add a transfer-manifest readiness command to the verified launcher before the CUDA training handoff.
pabcd.audit: Current launcher verifies the packet then runs training; transfer manifest readiness is generated elsewhere but not enforced by the launcher.

pabcd.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, regenerate artifacts, validate shell/JSON, evidence strings, status, and diff checks.
pabcd.done: Verification passed; launcher artifacts now require transfer-manifest readiness before training and are ready for commit/push. Follow-up packet refresh is required. Release remains NOT_GO.
